title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Sri Chaitanya - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Sri Chaitanya - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Sri Chaitanya family as a Curriculum Developer in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Sri Chaitanya:
Sri Chaitanya is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sri Chaitanya!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
